message:
fix: contiguous arena allocator for frozen interpreter on Linux x86_64

- native_arena.zig: reserve 8GB contiguous virtual address space via mmap
  PROT_NONE, commit pages on demand with mprotect. Fixes CompressedValue
  44-bit pointer truncation crash when arena grew to non-contiguous blocks.
- runtime.zig: auto-select arena allocator on Linux when freeze is enabled
- build.zig: link libstdc++.so.6 directly (Zig substitutes libc++ for -lstdc++),
  link libncurses.so.6 directly (Zig can't parse linker scripts)
- Rebuild prebuilt WAMR libs against LLVM-20
